2026-04-17.content:
Cloud Scheduler is available in the following [locations](https://docs.cloud.google.com/scheduler/docs/locations):

* `europe-west4` (Eemshaven, Netherlands)
* `me-central1` (Doha, Qatar)
* `me-central2` (Dammam, Saudi Arabia)
* `me-west1` (Tel Aviv, Israel)

summary.title: Cloud Scheduler now in new locations
summary.summary: Cloud Scheduler has expanded its availability to include new regions: europe-west4, me-central1, me-central2, and me-west1. This change allows for more flexible and localized job scheduling.

2025-09-29.content: VPC Service Controls support for Cloud Scheduler jobs has been extended to Google Cloud APIs that are VPC Service Controls-compliant. For more information, see [Secure cron jobs with VPC Service Controls](https://docs.cloud.google.com/scheduler/docs/secure-with-vpcsc).

summary.title: VPC SC support for Cloud Scheduler
summary.summary: VPC Service Controls now support Cloud Scheduler jobs for Google Cloud APIs that are compatible with VPC Service Controls.
